title: X Engineering Intern Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your X Engineering Intern interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your Palo Alto, CA</br>NYC internship.
content:
# X Engineering Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your X Engineering Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Palo Alto, CA</br>NYC
**Application Status:** Open for Applications

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from X
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

X is offering a Engineering Intern internship position in Palo Alto, CA</br>NYC. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research X's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your X interview and increase your chances of success.
